/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/brownian_motion.dir/src/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/brownian_motion.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/brownian_motion.dir/src/physics_engine.cpp.o -o brownian_motion  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
